bodyHtml:
Recent operator-action digest

Window: last 7 day(s) · scope=morning-brief-editor (editorial — sees all) Items: 12 · Forecasts emitted: 4 · Positions opened: 0

Each item below was extracted by the operator from a recent editor / QA / quality review, routed to an analyst, and either completed or is mid-flight. Use this to - avoid re-asking questions another analyst already investigated - pick up contradictions noted by the editor and resolved by a peer - weight your own conclusions against fresh forecast evidence

2026-05-27 · [coverage_followup] Add CFETS RMB Index weekly change and CNH-CNY basis series in CNY section

DONE

Section 5: Add the complete official 2026-05-15 CFETS value and fuller CNH-CNY basis series; if unavailable, label 'current-account support' as an inference.

  • Outcome: research:CNY,CNH → completed | dir=sessions/e51b4902-9fe9-4d2c-bfe3-21440a669340 | summary: CNY,CNH并非上市公司、基金或经营性法人主体；CNY是人民币官方ISO货币代码，CNH是外汇市场用于表示离岸人民币交易的市场术语，不是官方ISO货币代码。[S1][S2] 因此，本报告不设股票每股目标价，不使用EPS、P/E、P/B、EV/EBITDA或DCF股权现金流；所有“目标价”均指人民币多头敞口下的USD/CNH外汇情景锚。[S1][S2][S3][自测算] | → 1 forecast(s) on CNY,CNH, 0 position(s) opened

  • Forecasts: 1 (0 positions); tickers: CNY, CNH

2026-05-27 · [coverage_followup] Add German Bund or ECB OIS data for 2026-05-15 in EUR/USD section

DONE

Section 5: Add data for 20026-05-15; if unavailable, soften wording from 'rate differentials led' to 'available evidence points to USD rates...'

  • Outcome: research:EUR/USD → completed | dir=sessions/059cbdf0-0f78-4529-9902-c44ee28478b4 | summary: EUR/USD 是欧元兑美元外汇货币对，不是公司、股票或经营主体；欧洲中央银行在 2026年5月22日列示 USD 参考汇率为 1.1595，且说明其欧元外汇参考汇率以欧元为基础货币报价。[S1] 因此，本报告把“评级”定义为 EUR/USD 多头/空头观点，把“目标价”定义为 12个月 EUR/USD 汇率目标，而不使用 EPS、PE、PB、EV/EBITDA 或股权 DCF 作为有效估值方法。[S1][S2][自测算] | → 1 forecast(s) on EUR/USD, 0 position(s) opened

  • Forecasts: 1 (0 positions); tickers: EUR/USD

2026-05-27 · [research_task] Reconcile freight fundamentals with equity pricing

DONE

Investigate why tightening freight fundamentals (DAT/BlueGrace) are not being confirmed by transport equities like IYT, FDX, and UPS, as highlighted in Section 1.

  • Outcome: research:IYT, FDX, UPS → failed | error: upstream status: failed

2026-05-27 · [research_task] Verify restaurant bifurcation trend

DONE

Examine CAVA 2026-05-19 earnings (transactions, throughput, mix) to see if rising fast-casual traffic suggests a preference for CAVA/CMG-style brands over legacy QSR, per Section 4.

  • Outcome: research:CAVA → failed | error: upstream status: failed

2026-05-27 · [research_task] Trace QUCY trading data to original market source

DONE

Trace social-side price, volume, and RSI figures to original market-data source because TMT rejected listed equity existence (Ref: Questions Still Pending Verification).

  • Outcome: research:QUCY → completed | dir=sessions/75acfbdb-23d0-4c67-8cd8-693c92cb1cc4 | summary: 投资结论为强卖，原因有三点：第一，QUCY 在 2026 年一季度继续经营收入为 $0、继续经营亏损为 $(2,485,595)、现金流量表口径期末现金为 $4,752,966，说明当前基本面仍处于商业验证前阶段。[S1] 第二，David E. Lazar 持有可转换为 477,000,000 股普通股的优先股权益，BP United Inc. 许可交易包含 20,000,000 股普通股对价，并另向 Alexander Gurevich 发行 5,000,000 股顾问股份，使完全转换经济股数达到 516,661,169 股。[S3…

  • Forecasts: 1 (0 positions); tickers: QUCY

2026-05-27 · [research_task] Monitor China May import/export data for 2333.HK and 1919.HK

DONE

Use China customs import/export data emerging around 2026-05-20 as a catalyst for 2333.HK and 1919.HK positions, as per Section 2.3.

  • Outcome: research:2333.HK,1919.HK → completed | dir=sessions/6338da0f-b50f-4fa8-95c4-234da87cf434 | summary: 本报告仅覆盖 2333.HK 长城汽车股份有限公司与 1919.HK 中远海运控股股份有限公司。[S1][S2] 结论上，2333.HK 给予买入（buy），核心是当前价格接近压力情景、海外与新能源仍在放量、估值对 2027E 利润率修复敏感；1919.HK 给予中性（neutral），核心是资产负债表和资本回报仍有支撑，但 2026 年一季度已进入明显量增价降与利润下行阶段。[S3][S4][S5][S8][S9][自测算] | → 1 forecast(s) on 2333.HK,1919.HK…

  • Forecasts: 1 (0 positions); tickers: 2333.HK, 1919.HK

2026-05-25 · [research_task] 将 AI capex 项目转化为可执行组合 sleeve

DONE · owner=chief-strategist

把长期 AI capex 项目 rp_8ee890a3923e4b45 的“GPU/HBM 底仓 + 电力/散热/基荷对冲”框架转化为下午可执行的组合 sleeve，明确 NVDA 与电力设备、绿色基荷、先进散热材料的相对权重建议。(来源: Section 4)

  • Outcome: Used in cadence: AI sleeve expressed through order-verified hardware plus power/software hedges rather than broad beta.

2026-05-25 · [research_task] 将 AI capex 项目转化为可执行组合 sleeve

DONE · owner=chief-strategist

把长期 AI capex 项目 rp_8ee890a3923e4b45 的“GPU/HBM 底仓 + 电力/散热/基荷对冲”框架转化为下午可执行的组合 sleeve，明确 NVDA 与电力设备、绿色基荷、先进散热材料的相对权重建议。(来源: Section 4)

  • Outcome: Used in cadence: AI capex sleeve kept as GPU/HBM exposure with power/cooling/base-load hedges, subject to crowding controls.

2026-05-25 · [research_task] 审视高贝塔科技因子敞口并确定避险策略

DONE · owner=chief-strategist

在欧洲PMI跌破47.5及地缘政治窗口背景下，评估是否需将整体Beta敞口减至最低并转向低波红利 (Sec 4)

  • Outcome: Used in cadence: high-beta exposure remains constrained by VaR and VIX-triggered de-risking.

2026-05-25 · [research_task] Re-examine AI-compute theme de-risking strategy

DONE · owner=chief-strategist

Given the 2026-05-20 close and all-time highs in leaders, determine if it's time to de-risk and define target weights for first-line, second-line, and defensive hedges, as requested in the follow-up.

  • Outcome: Used in institutional read: de-risk installation-sensitive AI hardware and keep order-verified AI exposure.

2026-05-24 · [research_task] 评估通缩压力与PBOC利率引导空间

DONE · owner=china-macro

在PPI持续低迷背景下，评估PBOC是否会在三季度进一步下调1年期MLF利率，以及其对债市短端利率的引导空间。

  • Outcome: Evaluated Q3 MLF cut space and short-end CGB yield guidance under commodity PPI push and NIM constraints in PBOC Policy Outlook section of 研究档案

2026-05-24 · [research_task] Evaluate PBoC next move: quantity vs price tools

DONE · owner=china-macro

Weight the probability of PBoC easing via quantity tools (re-lending, MLF) vs another LPR cut, assuming low CPI and poor property sales as requested in the follow_ups section.

  • Outcome: Weighted quantity vs price tools probability (70% vs 30%) in PBOC Policy Outlook section of 研究档案
